tree.setup: After dinner, you see a neighbor putting out food for stray cats in the courtyard. You stop to watch.
tree.setup_zh: 吃完晚饭后，你看到邻居在院子里给流浪猫放吃的。你停下来看。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你也喜欢猫吧？这些猫每天晚上都来。它们认识我了。
turns.text_pinyin: Nǐ yě xǐhuan māo ba? Zhèxiē māo měi tiān wǎnshang dōu lái. Tāmen rènshi wǒ le.
turns.text_en: You like cats too, right? These cats come every night. They know me now.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Share your feelings about the cats.

options.text_zh: 它们看起来很信任你。你喂了多长时间了？
options.text_pinyin: Tāmen kàn qǐlái hěn xìnrèn nǐ. Nǐ wèi le duō cháng shíjiān le?
options.text_en: They seem to trust you a lot. How long have you been feeding them?
options.feedback: Observant and warm — notices the bond.
Insensitive to someone who cares for them.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 快两年了。刚开始它们很怕人，现在看到我就跑过来。那只灰色的最亲人。
turns.text_pinyin: Kuài liǎng nián le. Gāng kāishǐ tāmen hěn pà rén, xiànzài kàn dào wǒ jiù pǎo guòlái. Nà zhī huīsè de zuì qīn rén.
turns.text_en: Almost two years. At first they were scared of people — now they run to me. The grey one is the friendliest.

options.text_zh: 两年了！你真有耐心。我可以帮你一起喂吗？
options.text_pinyin: Liǎng nián le! Nǐ zhēn yǒu nàixīn. Wǒ kěyǐ bāng nǐ yīqǐ wèi ma?
options.text_en: Two years! You're so patient. Can I help you feed them?
options.feedback: Admiring and willing to join — builds community.

options.text_en: I don't want to keep a cat.
options.feedback: She's not asking you to adopt one.
Sounds like you want to leave.

tree.cultural_note: Community cat feeders (喂流浪猫的人) are unsung heroes of Chinese neighborhoods. Their patience transforms fearful strays into friendly companions. This quiet care reflects the iyashikei spirit — small acts of kindness that heal.
